name: @chbrain/khai-engine-goal
description: khai goal engine — the desired state a persona is oriented toward and how they hold the pursuit
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The desired state a persona is oriented toward and how they hold the pursuit.

card.wire: Link the goal orientation the persona holds (approach, avoidance, mastery, or performance) under Projection.
card.issue: What the persona is pursuing or avoiding, and what makes the goal specific, challenging, and owned by this persona.
card.require: A goal must be the persona's own: consciously held, valued, and connected to how they understand what they are doing.
card.enforce: Do not use this engine to model what the persona wants in an abstract sense. A goal is specific, has direction (toward or away), and shapes what the persona attends to and how they interpret setbacks.
card.setup: Name the goal, its orientation (approach or avoidance) and type (mastery or performance), and what the persona believes determines whether they succeed.
